decision: Should the team pilot the fictional AI procurement copilot in supplier onboarding?
decision_body: Risk and Compliance Council, chaired by the Head of Procurement Operations.
default_outcome: Do not pilot; retain the existing manual review workflow.
why_now: Document rework is delaying onboarding, while the next council review provides a bounded decision point.

claims.claim: The synthetic baseline records 18% rework on document completeness.
claims.weakest_link: The mixed document classes may hide variation.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: A clean re-count below 8% would weaken the pilot case.

claims.claim: A retrieval prototype answered 70% of a synthetic 50-case set correctly.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: Accuracy below 50% on an unseen set would stop the pilot.

claims.claim: Human approval is required before any supplier-facing action.
claims.weakest_link: Approval and full review are not yet distinguished.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: An unresolved review definition would make acceptance criteria impossible.

claims.claim: Risk review should cover context, impacts, measurement, and treatment rather than model accuracy alone.
claims.weakest_link: The framework does not prescribe this local workflow.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: If the council cannot map the pilot to named controls, postpone it.

claims.claim: The pilot must test sensitive-information disclosure and excessive agency risks.
claims.weakest_link: The taxonomy identifies risks but does not prove control effectiveness.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: A critical disclosure or unauthorized action in testing would block the pilot.

uncertainties: The unseen-case accuracy distribution is unknown.
The cost of complete audit logging is not yet measured.

artifact.form: Public fictional case plus internal pilot memo
artifact.survives_author: The JSON brief, evidence matrix, and report can be rerun by a new reviewer.
artifact.acceptance_criteria: A reviewer can trace every scored claim to its source tier and decision consequence.

feedback.next_move_threshold: Stop if one critical control failure occurs or measured rework reduction is below 10%.
feedback.review_question: Which missing evidence would most likely reverse the pilot decision?
